task:
Add a new RSS/Atom (Feeds) account to Thunderbird named exactly `Tech News Feeds`, subscribed to these three feeds with the destination folder set to the account root:
- https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/technology/rss.xml
- https://www.theverge.com/rss/index.xml
- https://hnrss.org/frontpage

Also create a regular subfolder (not a feed folder) named exactly `Headlines` under the `Tech News Feeds` account.
